## Checklist

- [ ] PR is focused on a single logical change
- [ ] `python -m pytest -m "not network"` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or generated output files committed
- [ ] Matched the surrounding code style (typed Python / vanilla JS+CSS)
- [ ] Updated docs/comments if behavior changed
